## Change

Describe the behavior changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests`
- [ ] `python3 -m py_compile tokensaver/*.py`
- [ ] Relevant demo or integration path was exercised

## Local-first check

- [ ] No prompt, context, trace, or tool output is uploaded by default
- [ ] No required cloud or LLM dependency was added to the core diagnosis loop
